output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-106","author":"SarahJenkins84","text":"Has anyone else received this message from 'Global Ticket Solutions'? They claim they can secure VIP front-row seats for the upcoming concert at the Royal Albert Hall but ask you to transfer £500 via a private app link right now. The email came from an address that doesn't match their official domain. Is this a scam or just a last-minute cancellation notice? 🎟️ #ConcertLife","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This post requires specialist investigation to distinguish between a legitimate high-demand ticket service and a sophisticated phishing attempt involving financial transfer requests.","day":1,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
